name: @jeswr/kernel-e4-prep
description: E4 emission-test data prep (docs/poc-design.md Phase E, E4 rev 2): 1e3-concept synthetic vocabulary, kernel/control vector tables at d_model=512 (kot-enc-Bq/1), independently authored naturalistic glosses (>=5 per concept, target-lexicon-disjoint, hash-published-before-training), two-tier holdout + compositional split pre-registration, and the gloss->concept emission shard builder (python, E1 shard format).

scripts.synth: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/synthVocab.js
scripts.vectors: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/vectorTables.js
scripts.glosses: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/glosses.js
scripts.holdout: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/holdout.js
scripts.inputs: npm run synth && npm run vectors && npm run glosses && npm run holdout
scripts.test: npm run build && nice -n 10 node --test dist/test/*.test.js
